intro: Mycaranthes pannea, also known as the Pannea orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family, characterized by its showy white flowers and slender leaves. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help to soothe respiratory issues and protect against infections. The bioactive constituents of Mycaranthes pannea include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
